svg.title: From Pain to Venture – Part 10 Reference Images
svg.desc: Reference images for Part 10: Demand Creation Costs, AIDAR Demand Path, and Channel Testing Plan.
svg.text: From Pain to Venture – Part 10 Reference Images
Three costs: Understanding Cost · Trust Cost · Action Cost
Demand creation is not pushing customers down a funnel.
It is giving each step enough reason to continue.
Each stage needs a different message, different proof,
and a different action cost reduction.
Six channels: SEO · LinkedIn · Cold Email · Referral ·
Judge by behaviour, not by exposure.
• A good product does not mean the market will understand it
• Dare to Market: ask whether the market will move, not only can we sell
• Founder-led sales is the fastest learning loop — not a fallback
• Demand creation connects pain, value proposition, and positioning.
